strengths: Extensive full-stack experience (8+ years) with TypeScript, Node.js, and React, directly matching the primary stack
Proven track record in building scalable systems (e.g., Optilyz: millions of paper mails annually; Dunnhumby: millions of HTTP requests/second)
Strong open-source contributions and AI-agent development experience (e.g., re:cinq, MCP code generators)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js (primary backend framework in the role) or Vitest (testing framework)
No direct evidence of cloud platform expertise (AWS/GCP/Azure) in recent roles, despite Docker/Kubernetes experience
German language skills are basic, which may impact collaboration in a Berlin-based team
response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong alignment with the role's core competencies, including 8+ years of full-stack development (TypeScript/Node.js/React) and experience building scalable systems (e.g., Optilyz, Dunnhumby). Evidence of AI-agent development (re:cinq) and open-source contributions further strengthens fit. However, the resume lacks explicit mention of Nest.js or cloud platforms (AWS/GCP), which are critical for the role. German language skills are also a minor concern for local collaboration.
